import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
import scipy.stats as stats

def task_func(x, y, labels):
    fig, axs = plt.subplots(len(labels), figsize=(10, 6))

    for i, (compound, data) in enumerate(zip(labels, zip(x, y))):
        mean, std = data
        ax = axs[i]
        mu, sigma = mean, std
        x = np.linspace(mu - 3 * sigma, mu + 3 * sigma, 100)
        p = stats.norm(mu, sigma).pdf(x)

        ax.plot(x, p, label=compound)
        ax.set_xlabel('X-axis')
        ax.set_ylabel('Probability Density')
        ax.legend()
        if i != len(labels) - 1:
            ax.set_xticks([])
            ax.set_yticks([])

    fig.tight_layout()
    return fig
